channel.title: Poetries on Apophenian
channel.description: Recent content in Poetries on Apophenian

item.title: Domestic Horticulturalists
item.description:
The grass has grown so long,
It is underfoot no more.
It is around our ankles,
Our knees,
Our eyes.
A green jungle,
The blue sky.
A tiger like kitten
Prowls the grasslands and prairies of our love.
A rumbling purr,
A quiet resentment,
A long past feeling of order and restraint.
A painful clarity and of course,
The hopeless boredom
Of you
And me
And our contempt for gardening.
